creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
Every week we rotate the mailing lists archive and move files arounds.

However, we do this for a lot of legacy lists, which do not receive emails for years. E.g. "svn-src-stable-6"

These legacy lists should be removed from the rotation and no longer copied to the archive of the current year.

So fare, the following mailing lists are no longer active:

aic7xxx
ctm-announce
freebsd-afs
freebsd-alpha
freebsd-atm
freebsd-audit
freebsd-binup
